query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.customerName, o.status, o.createdAt, 
       oi.id as itemId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.totalPrice, oi.complements
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN orderItems oi ON o.id = oi.orderId
WHERE o.establishmentId = 30001
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
